project_type: React + TypeScript board game SPA using Vite and Zustand for state management
test_framework: No formal test framework found - validation via build only
verification_instructions: Run `npx vite build` and confirm it compiles without TypeScript errors
environment_constraints: No test runner available, just TypeScript build validation
key_patterns: Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts with get/set pattern. Game logic pure functions in src/utils/gameLogic.ts. i18n via src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts with TranslationKey type. Monster card IDs: sp-komainu (shinto+monster), su-yurei (daimyo+monster), sp-fukurokuju (daimyo+monster), su-hotei (shinto+monster). Player reserves: bushi(number), shinto(number), fortresses(number), hasDaimyo(boolean), monsters(number). Initial values: bushi=6, shinto=3, fortresses=4, hasDaimyo=false, monsters=0. After deployment: bushi=5, shinto=3, fortresses=3.
directory_structure: src/store/ (Zustand store), src/utils/ (game logic), src/components/ (React components), src/types/ (TypeScript types), src/i18n/ (translations)
